headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Quanta Services (PWR) After A 112% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Quanta Services at around US$560 per share is still priced reasonably, you are not alone. Many investors are asking what the recent run in the stock really implies about value. The share price sits near US$560.12 after a 1 year return of 111.9% and a year to date gain of 27.4%, although returns over the last 7 and 30 days are mildly negative at 2.3% and 2.2% declines. Recent coverage has focused on Quanta Services as a key player in large scale infrastructure and...
